evals.prompt: Run a quick security scan on this project using semgrep. I want to check for vulnerabilities with the owasp top ten rules and see results in the terminal.
evals.expected_output: Semgrep scan runs with --config p/owasp-top-ten, outputs colorized terminal results
expectations: Output format is terminal/colorized (no --json or --sarif flag)
Reports findings in a structured format

evals.prompt: I have a custom semgrep rule file at .semgrep/my-rules.yaml. Please validate it and then scan the src/ directory with it. I want JSON output saved to results.json for my CI pipeline.
evals.expected_output: First validates the rule file, then scans with JSON output saved to results.json
expectations: Uses --output or --json-output to save to results.json

evals.prompt: We're setting up CI security scanning. I need to scan only the changes since we branched from origin/main, using the default rule pack. Output SARIF format so we can upload to GitHub Advanced Security.
evals.expected_output: Incremental scan with --baseline-commit origin/main, --config p/default, SARIF output
expectations: Mentions SARIF can be uploaded to GitHub Advanced Security
